lede: A look at February 10 through the almanac — historic events, famous birthdays including Antonio Arena and Reinhold Yabo, and the day's notable deaths and observances.

events.title: 2026 Tumbler Ridge shooting
events.desc: Shootings at a residence and a school in Tumbler Ridge, British Columbia, Canada, leave nine people dead and 27 injured.

events.title: Communications satellite
events.desc: The communications satellites Iridium 33 and Kosmos 2251 collide in orbit, destroying both.

events.title: Ras Al Khaimah
events.desc: Ras Al Khaimah joins the United Arab Emirates, now making up seven emirates.

events.title: World War II
events.desc: World War II: Attempting to completely lift the Siege of Leningrad, the Soviet Red Army engages German troops and Spanish volunteers in the Battle of Krasny Bor.

events.title: Spanish Civil War
events.desc: Spanish Civil War: The Nationalists conclude their conquest of Catalonia and seal the border with France.

events.title: Second Italo-Ethiopian War
events.desc: Second Italo-Abyssinian War: Italian troops launch the Battle of Amba Aradam against Ethiopian defenders.

events.title: Việt Nam Quốc Dân Đảng
events.desc: The Việt Nam Quốc Dân Đảng launches the failed Yên Bái mutiny in hope of overthrowing French protectorate over Vietnam.

events.title: HMS Dreadnought (1906)
events.desc: HMS Dreadnought, the first of a revolutionary new breed of battleships, is christened.

events.title: American Civil War
events.desc: American Civil War: A Union naval flotilla destroys the bulk of the Confederate Mosquito Fleet in the Battle of Elizabeth City on the Pasquotank River in North Carolina.

events.title: Huilliche uprising of 1712
events.desc: Huilliches in Chiloé rebel against Spanish encomenderos.

births.name: Enele Sopoaga
births.line: Tuvaluan politician, 12th Prime Minister of Tuvalu

deaths.text: Jose de Venecia Jr., Filipino politician and journalist, 17th and 21st Speaker of the Philippine House of Representatives
W. Watts Biggers, American author, screenwriter, and animator
Abraham Beame, American academic and politician, 104th Mayor of New York City
John A. Roche, American lawyer and politician, 30th Mayor of Chicago

observances.text: Christian feast day: Blessed Eusebia Palomino Yenes
Christian feast day: José Sánchez del Río
Fenkil Day(commemoration of the Second Battle of Massawa) (Eritrea)
